entries.description: Added src/utils/copilotCli.ts (probeCopilotCliPresenceCore mirrors probePythonPresenceCore: explicit dabblerSessionSets.copilotCliPath setting decides alone -> copilot on PATH, .exe-only on win32 to match the catalog module's shell=False subprocess semantics); wired resolveCopilotCliPresent thunk + copilotCliPresent payload flag into computeGettingStarted (getting-started-mode gated, quiet true default) and CustomSessionSetsView; contributed the copilotCliPath setting.

Added transportProfileBlockHtml (Full-only, omitted on Lightweight - the budgetBlockHtml conditional-render pattern) with api/copilot-cli radios, api default-checked; placed between the tier radios and the budget block; client.js change listener re-renders on flip (profileDirty). D6 env key warning additionally suppressed while copilot-cli is selected (the keyless target audience must not be told to set DABBLER_* keys) - judgment call recorded for verification.

Extended gsState/persistGsState/restoreGsState with the seat-profile family (transportProfile default api, profileDirty, lastProfileSeed) using the exact tier/mode seed-dirty-reload precedence; payload gained transportProfileSeed (host resolver deliberately omitted until Session 2 wires the durable transport.profile write - seed is null); client.js seed tuple extended (lastSeedProfile). Copilot-missing warning (copilotWarningHtml, data-gs-warning=copilot) renders hidden inside the block, visible only when copilot selected AND probe failed; absent payload flag fails quiet.

Layer-2 tests authored via routed test-generation (gemini-pro, $0.086) and adapted: copilotCli.test.ts (13 probe-core cases), 4 new gettingStartedHtml suites (block render, warning, D6 suppression, seat-profile seed precedence), computeGettingStarted thunk gating suite; existing payload/defaults assertions updated. 1133 passing, tsc clean.

Routed code-review (opus, $0.334): generator found no blocking issues; cross-provider verifier (gpt-5-4) returned ISSUES_FOUND with one Major on the explicit-.cmd probe path. Adjudicated with two empirical subprocess runs: the prescribed fix (reject explicit .cmd) was wrong (spawn genuinely executes explicit .cmd), but the underlying comment overclaim + test gap were real and fixed. record_adjudication written (context-gap / accept-dismissal).
Gated routed session-verification (gate verdict REQUIRED: blast-radius, breadth, build-ci-config). Raw output saved to s1-verification.md.

Hooked the catalog refresh strictly after the scaffold sequence (venv -> pip install -> template render) in buildProjectStructureNoPrompt, reusing the install outcome's venvPath via venvPython() (the same interpreter resolution Dabbler: Install ai-router uses); install-failed path gets an honest skip warning, never a silent bypass.

Auto-derived seat identity: deriveSeatId = seat- + sha256(hostname|username)[:12] (trimmed/lowercased inputs), deriveSeatLabel = workspace folder basename with 'workspace' fallback; no operator-typed fields (critique C1). Explicit copilotCliPath setting threads to --binary via resolveCopilotCliBinary (probe/spawn agreement).

runCatalogRefresh: cancellable child process with lockfile snapshot/restore on every non-completed path; vscode.window.withProgress cancellable notification (INDETERMINATE - the CLI prints nothing until its final line, per-model progress not parseable; critique m2 fallback recorded); teardown disposal hook in context.subscriptions with post-exit re-restore; post-kill force-settle timeout; win32 taskkill /T tree-kill.

Refresh result parsed from the CLI's own stdout line (never exit code); >=2 distinct providers gates the config write; transport.profile rendered as an anchored direct-child field replacement in the transport: block (renderTransportProfile - fail-loud on missing anchor or operator-edited value, never an append); refresh-ok-but-write-failed reported as its own config-write-failed state; readTransportProfile wired as the durable transportProfileSeed source (S1 handoff note).

54 new Layer-2 tests (routed test-generation, adapted platform-safe) covering seat identity, pinned argv, stdout parsing, anchored render (incl. nested-sub-block Major from the cross-verifier), cancel/teardown/late-cancel races, kill timeout, seat-setup outcomes, rider narrowing. Routed code-review (opus, gpt-5-4 auto-verify) returned 2 Major + 1 verifier Major - all fixed in-session with pinning tests; minors 3/4/6/8 fixed, atomic-write + POSIX tree-kill deferred to S3 failure matrix as named residuals.

Real live-seat dogfood via performCopilotSeatSetup (real venv python + real copilot CLI 1.0.68, scratch project): SUCCESS in 102s, 15/18 models confirmed, providers=[anthropic, google, openai], transport.profile: copilot-cli written, valid lockfile. Suites: Layer-2 mocha 1188 passing, tsc --noEmit clean, eslint clean, pytest 2483 passed/5 skipped, Playwright Layer 3 19 passed (client.js changed -> L-064-12 local run).

Routed gate: REQUIRED (blast-radius, multi-module, breadth). Cross-provider session verification on gpt-5-4 (OpenAI): R1 ISSUES_FOUND (1 Major: gitScaffold integration wiring unpinned) -> fixed via decideCopilotSeatSetup + injectable seams + gitScaffoldSeatSetup.test.ts; R2 held the same ledger issue (S2-V-001) partially-fixed -> BuildStructureSeams drives the REAL buildProjectStructureNoPrompt path in 4 more tests; R3 VERIFIED. Ledger discipline kept a single issueId across rounds. Post-fix suites: Layer-2 1206 passing, tsc/eslint clean, dist rebuilt, Playwright re-run 19 passed.

Implemented the corrected failure UX (critique C3): pure describeSeatSetupOutcome composer in copilotSeatSetup.ts keyed on the same DABBLER_* presence probe the Full-tier key warning uses (providerKeyPresent) - every failure outcome (insufficient-providers, refresh-failed, cancelled, config-write-failed, skip-install-incomplete) lands in one of two honest states: keyless => 'router is not yet functional' + reason-specific fix; keys present => api offered as a genuinely working fallback. Reason-specific guidance distinguishes confirmed==0 (CLI missing/not signed in) from a 1-provider enterprise-locked seat. gitScaffold messaging switch replaced by the composer.

Closed the two named S2 residuals: (1) atomic config write - writeConfigAtomically (temp + rename via new optional FileOps.rename; makeFileOps implements fs.renameSync; plain-write fallback when ops lack rename; failed rename cleans temp and reports config-write-failed); (2) POSIX process-tree kill - refresh child spawned detached on POSIX (own process group), cancel signals the group (kill(-pid, SIGTERM)) via resolveKillStrategy; win32 taskkill /T unchanged. tsc --noEmit clean.

Real induced-failure dogfood (driver: scratchpad s3_dogfood.js, real venv python + real GitHub Copilot CLI 1.0.68, scratch project, 2026-07-05). Run A missing binary (--binary nonexistent): completed 0.3s, 0/18 confirmed, providers=[] -> insufficient-providers; lockfile kept (CLI's own artifact); config stays api; keyless message says 'not yet functional' + 'CLI may be missing from PATH'. Run B mid-run cancel against the REAL CLI at 15s: child pid 14948 had 2 live descendants pre-cancel; post-cancel outcome=cancelled, python pid dead, BOTH descendants dead (taskkill /T tree-kill verified), NO partial lockfile (restored to pre-run absent). Run C atomic config write on real NTFS: temp+rename replaced existing router-config.yaml, profile: copilot-cli, no tmp left behind. Results persisted to s3-dogfood-results.json in the session scratchpad.

requiresE2E: suggested - DECISION: no Playwright Layer-3 addition for the async-progress UI. Reasoning: the progress surface is a native vscode.window.withProgress notification, not webview DOM - the Layer-3 harness renders the Explorer/Getting Started webview in a browser and cannot drive native VS Code notifications. Everything behind that surface (cancellable-notification options, cancellation propagation, teardown disposal, per-outcome honest messaging) is pinned at Layer 2 through SeatSetupProgressSeams/BuildStructureSeams against the real runCopilotSeatSetupWithProgress and buildProjectStructureNoPrompt paths, plus two real-CLI dogfoods (S2 happy path; S3 induced failures). Sessions 2-3 added no new webview DOM (S1's radio/warning already has Layer-2 render tests), so there is no rendered-DOM delta for Playwright to cover.

Layer-2 failure-matrix tests: routed test-generation (gemini-pro) produced the honest-UX matrix (5 outcome kinds x keyed/keyless), writeConfigAtomically cases, performCopilotSeatSetup atomic-write integration, and kill-strategy selectors; adapted (composer copy re-grounded, tmp-write assertion fixed for move-semantics fake). Routed code-review (opus -> gpt-5-4 auto-verify VERIFIED, $0.44): 1 Major (POSIX kill dispatch had no unit coverage -> extracted injectable dispatchKill(platform, pid, KillEffects), spawner now calls it with real effects, 5 new dispatch tests incl. sync-throw fallback), 2 Minors fixed (keyless tests now also assert the NEGATIVE half - no api-works claim; taskkill spawn failure now falls back via the taskkill child's async error event), 3 suggestions taken (comment rewording, atomicity guarantee scoped to process-crash, exhaustiveness never-guard on the composer). Suite: 1234 passing, tsc --noEmit clean, changed-files eslint clean (6 pre-existing no-var-requires errors in 5 untouched Set-077-era test files are baseline, not S3 regressions).

Routed gate: REQUIRED (blast-radius, multi-module, breadth). Cross-provider session verification on gpt-5-4 (OpenAI): R1 returned two findings with NO verdict token and NO severities -> treated as blocking per the anti-laundering rule (L-071-1); ledger ids S3-V-001 (async taskkill fallback untested -> fixed via exported makeRealKillEffects factory + TaskkillSpawn seam + 3 pinning tests) and S3-V-002 (skip-install honesty tests missing the negative half -> fixed). R2 (narrow, fixes-only) VERIFIED, both ledger ids resolved, no regression. Suites at close: mocha 1237 passing, tsc clean, changed-files eslint clean, pytest 2483/5 skipped, Playwright 19 passed. Artifacts: s3-verification.md, s3-verification-round-2.md, s3-issues.json.

Finalized the simplified verification-mode copy from the spec draft after verifying the dedicated description against actual Mode B behavior (workflow doc: operator-started typed sessions, engine-or-provider difference, close-out gate hard-blocks interactive set-terminal close) - no automation overclaim (critique m3). New strings: OUT_OF_BAND='Manual review (default) - paste a review prompt into a second AI assistant yourself and record what it says.'; DEDICATED='Separate verification sessions - a dedicated session on a different AI engine or provider reviews the work before the set can close.' Updated VERIFICATION_MODE_*_TEXT in media/session-sets-tree/gettingStartedHtml.js (values unchanged); added a literal pin test + render assertions to gettingStartedHtml.test.ts (no prior test pinned the exact strings - they asserted via constant reference only).

Repo-wide grep sweep for the OLD strings and distinctive fragments (full sentences, 'copy a review prompt into a second AI assistant', 'structured verification sessions run', 'with a close-out gate', 'verdict by hand'). Verbatim quoters found and updated: README.md:144-150 and tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/README.md:84-91. Deliberate residuals (recorded, not misses): 079 spec.md quotes the old strings as the before-state; 077 UAT checklist is a sealed attested record (Passes:true) - S5 authors the new-copy UAT; setupVerification.ts QuickPick copy is a different surface with its own wording; generic workflow uses of 'close-out gate'/'verdict by hand in external-verification.md' are not quotes; dist/extension.js does not embed the form copy (grep-verified - media webview script ships unbundled).

Routed code-review of the sweep (raw output saved to s4-code-review.md). Generator (sonnet) found 1 Major: the new pin-test comment falsely claimed both READMEs quote the strings verbatim (they paraphrase - a literal grep would miss them); fixed the comment to state the paraphrase relationship and name both README paths. Two Minors noted, no code change: (default)-marker placement differs by design between constant and README prose; 'reviews the work' phrasing judged within acceptable copy range (no automation overclaim). Auto-verify (gemini-pro) ISSUES_FOUND concerned the review artifact's own template completeness (no security/perf section for a copy-only diff), not the session code.

Full pre-commit pass green: python -m pytest 2483 passed / 5 skipped; npx tsc --noEmit clean; npm run test:unit 1238 passing (includes the new Set 079 S4 pin test asserting the exact simplified strings + block render); npm run test:playwright 17/19 first pass with 2 environmental flakes (migration-cta-v4:78, session-sets-tree:284 - F1 palette timeout under parallel load), both pass on isolated re-run; neither spec touches the getting-started form. Drift guard (test_drift_guard.py) included in the pytest pass. Incidental: the compile step revealed the committed dist/extension.js was stale relative to Session 3 dispatchKill/makeRealKillEffects source refactor (media copy is not bundled; the templates-only dist-in-sync guard cannot see extension.js) - the rebuilt bundle is included in this session commit to resync.

Routed gate REQUIRED (multi-module + breadth). Cross-provider session verification on gpt-5-4: VERIFIED round 1 (raw output saved unedited to s4-verification.md; bare verdict token, no summary prose - recorded, no wording-only re-verify opened per L-071-1). Disposition authored with verification_verdict=VERIFIED and routed next-orchestrator recommendation for S5 (claude-fable-5 @ high, gemini-pro analysis superseding the set-start medium).

Updated docs/concepts/tier-model.md (guided in-form seat setup as primary activation path, manual as fallback; evidence-basis extended with the M3 honesty note: multi-seat/enterprise unvalidated, 079 dogfood on the SAME personal seat as 078, POSIX-kill and power-loss limits), README.md and tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/README.md (Full-tier provider-access sub-choice + missing-CLI warning + same honesty caveat), and docs/templates/consumer-bootstrap/getting-started.md.template (keys required only for the direct-API option; Copilot CLI seat alternative described honestly). Decomposition prompt (sessionGenPrompt.ts) checked: references tier only at spec-authoring level (tier: full|lightweight), unchanged by this feature - no edit needed. Prose drafted via route(task_type=documentation) (gemini generator + gpt-5-4-mini auto-verify); three load-bearing claims the draft dropped were restored during merge (lockfile fail-closed sentence, 078 operator-override evidence record, $0-budget parenthetical).

Authored 079-copilot-seat-onboarding-and-verification-copy-uat-checklist.json to the Set 078/077-rewrite bar: 6 walks (sub-choice render, reload persistence, induced missing-CLI warning via copilotCliPath, REAL guided happy-path Build on the operator seat, REAL mid-run cancel, simplified verification-mode copy). Every literal string re-grounded against current source during authoring; every cited Layer-2 suite re-run fresh (Set 079 S1 suites 20/20, verification-mode block 5/5, copilotSeatSetup 82/82, gitScaffold 25/25); walks 4-5 lean on the S2/S3 real-seat dogfoods (102s success 15/18; real cancel, tree-kill, no partial lockfile). Ad-hoc floor validated: all 6 non-judgment items carry ProgrammaticVerification. Honest scope limits in Notes: single personal seat (M3), keys-present machine (keyless variants Layer-2-pinned), POSIX branch unwalkable on win32, no auth-failure walk (078 stance). Authored direct per the routed ai-assignment routing table (supersedes generic uat-plan-generation default, matching 077/078 practice).

Spec step 7 confirmed: git diff a05c014..HEAD -- ai_router/ pyproject.toml is EMPTY (tracked) and git status shows no working-tree changes there either; ai_router/router-metrics.jsonl is gitignored. The non-goals zero-ai_router-changes claim held -- this is an extension-only release (dabbler-ai-router stays 0.28.0; extension 0.34.0 -> 0.35.0).

Release prep: extension version 0.34.0 -> 0.35.0 (package.json), CHANGELOG.md 0.35.0 entry (extension-only release, honesty caveats + evidence limits recorded), docs/repository-reference.md release-status row + version-walk entry (publish PENDING operator UAT walk + tag authorization; rollback names extension 0.34.0 which is confirmed live on the Marketplace per L-078-1). npm run compile resynced dist/templates (getting-started template edit). Suites: pytest 2483 passed / 5 skipped (baseline); npx tsc --noEmit clean; npm run test:unit 1238 passing after regenerating the cold-start golden snapshots (the intended getting-started template drift; UPDATE_GOLDEN=1). No TS source changed this session (docs/copy/config only), so no new lint surface.

End-of-set multi-provider path-aware critique (ai_router.pull_critique, google gemini-2.5-pro + openai gpt-5.4, full-repo sandbox, get_diff a05c014..HEAD). Round lineage: R1 ran both critics but was DISCARDED unwritten by the producer identity guard (--level required vs the recorded policy none -- the spec prose said required but the config block never seeded it; spec-authoring gap flagged for Step 9). R2 wrote a valid artifact but its instruction framed the critics on S4 close summary only (the producer fills from disposition.json). R3 (FINAL, committed): preliminary set-wide S5 disposition authored first so the instruction covered the whole set; gemini VERIFIED 0 findings (release scope, honesty-note propagation, UAT checklist all checked); gpt-5.4 ISSUES_FOUND with 1 Major contract-drift, adjudicated accept-finding with false-premise notes (recorded via record_adjudication): the fictional test-fixture command string was fixed, the blocking claims (checklist reference; unfollowable recovery path) were refuted by grep/source evidence. Converged per L-070-1: artifact is evidence, adjudication in disposition; no further round (the residue was a test-string rename, exactly the Minor-churn L-071-1 forbids re-running two provider arms over).

M3 honesty note verified present on every required surface after the R1 fixes: tier-model.md evidence basis, both READMEs (same-seat-as-078 + explicit not-validated wording), the getting-started template, the CHANGELOG evidence-limits section, and the UAT checklist Notes/walk framing.

Cross-provider session verification (routed gate REQUIRED). gpt-5-4 R1: two findings, no verdict token/severities - blocking per L-071-1 anti-laundering; S5-V-001 (README honesty caveat incomplete) and S5-V-002 (stale generic key-requirement phrasing) both fixed; R2 narrow re-verify VERIFIED, both ledger ids RESOLVED. Artifacts: s5-verification.md, s5-verification-round-2.md, s5-issues.json. Routed cost this session (router-metrics): $0.25.

Pushed a5ca28b; GitHub Test workflow run 28737501450 completed SUCCESS (5m45s). Release state: extension 0.35.0 version-bumped and CI-green; vsix-v0.35.0 tag push HELD for operator UAT walk + authorization. Session left in-progress (disposition requires_review) pending the two operator-only items.

Operator walked UAT: walks 1/2/6 PASS; walks 4/5 FAIL on a real pre-existing defect (fresh guided Build produced no ai_router/router-config.yaml; the honest config-write-failed message fired after a successful probe); walk 3 recorded not-passing with no feedback (clarification requested). Root cause reproduced against the real published 0.28.0 wheel on this cp1252 host: the config-seed one-liner wrote the bundled config through the child python TEXT-mode stdout (cp1252 on Windows; config carries U+2192) -> UnicodeEncodeError -> silent fail-open skip. Same cp1252 class as Set 078 decode fix, encode side; S2 dogfood missed it because it drove performCopilotSeatSetup against a pre-seeded scratch config and the install tests stub the spawn. Fix: raw-bytes one-liner (READ_BUNDLED_ROUTER_CONFIG_CODE, pinned) + failed seed now named in the install message + (R3 finding S5-V-003, Major) per-chunk toString(utf8) multibyte-split corruption fixed class-wide via shared makeUtf8ChunkDecoder at all five spawner sinks (L-069-1 sweep). Verification R3 ISSUES_FOUND -> R4 VERIFIED (gpt-5-4, narrow rounds). Layer 2 1244 passing; tsc clean; bundle rebuilt. CHANGELOG 0.35.0 Fixed entry added. Operator also requested table-style reformatting of the two second-level radio groups - recorded as follow-up-scope candidate, operator decides placement.

Operator re-walked UAT against the rebuilt VSIX: walks 4 and 5 PASS (attested via chat + Passes flipped in the checklist; resolution notes appended to the original failure feedback). Walk 3 WAIVED by explicit operator decision (recorded in the checklist with the Layer-2 evidence rationale; consistent with the Set 078 S1 standing override authority). Walks 1/2/6 passed on the first walk. Doc-sufficiency audit before tag push found one gap: the auto-opened getting-started doc had no Copilot-CLI troubleshooting entry - added (mirrors the Python entry: separate install from editor Copilot, copilotCliPath decides alone, no re-scaffold needed after seat-check failures); cold-start goldens regenerated; suite 1244 passing, tsc clean. Operator authorized the vsix-v0.35.0 tag push and queued the radio-group table reformatting as Set 080.

RELEASE EXECUTED: operator authorized; tag vsix-v0.35.0 pushed on CI-green c2ed2b4; publish-vscode.yml run 28751504260 SUCCESS (Marketplace + Open VSX) 2026-07-05. repository-reference release-status and version-walk flipped to Published. Set 080 (sub-choice legibility + screenshot refresh) spec authored and queued not-started per operator request. Extension-only release confirmed end-to-end: router stays 0.28.0.
